profile.name: Naveen S
profile.title: AI Engineer | Full-Stack Developer
profile.tagline: Building intelligent systems and scalable applications with AI/ML, FastAPI, React, and LLM technologies
profile.about:
I'm an AI Engineering Intern at Thapovan @ Prayag.ai, where I build intelligent systems and scalable backend architectures. Currently pursuing my B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at Karpagam College of Engineering with a CGPA of 8.45.

My passion lies at the intersection of AI/ML and software engineering. I specialize in building production-ready applications that leverage the power of Large Language Models, real-time data processing, and modern web technologies.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new AI research papers, contributing to open-source projects, or solving algorithmic challenges on LeetCode.

education.degree: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science

experiences.title: AI Engineering Intern
experiences.description: Building AI-powered products and scalable backend systems

responsibilities.description: Engineered backend services for AI Notetaker, a scalable meeting intelligence platform using FastAPI, Node.js, React, Redis, and PostgreSQL.
Implemented secure authentication using JWT, HTTP-only cookies, session state, and token refresh for robust multi-session security.
Integrated OpenAI GPT-4/4o/4.1, Gemini 1.5/2.0, and LLM Agents for summarization, topic extraction, and workflow automation.
Built pipelines for sentiment analysis, semantic search, embeddings, vector similarity, and document processing.
Designed multi-agent orchestration for task routing, structured outputs, and contextual memory.
Optimized real-time transcription and inference using Redis caching, pub/sub, and async background workers.
Collaborated in Agile sprints, contributing to CI/CD, code reviews, and system architecture.

projects.title: Flowly (AI-Powered Transcription & Analysis Platform)
projects.description: Engineered a highly available, asynchronous REST API for automated multimedia transcription and AI-driven analysis. Designed resilient background processing pipelines, pluggable AI engine routing, and robust production-monitoring layers.
projects.highlights: ["Architected a high-throughput FastAPI backend to handle large audio/video file uploads, integrating FFmpeg for automated media extraction and preprocessing.","Developed a pluggable TranscriptionService routing layer, enabling dynamic, seamless switching between Google Gemini and Groq/Whisper inference engines.","Engineered a secure, persistent local-server file storage architecture to manage large media payloads and bypass external cloud dependency.","Designed a multi-tier asynchronous job execution system utilizing Redis and ARQ, complete with a custom SQLite fallback mode.","Implemented a state-reconciliation mechanism during application startup to automatically detect, recover, and reset processing tasks stalled due to server crashes.","Integrated Sentry for distributed tracing and Prometheus for real-time metric instrumentation, hardening the API with slowapi rate-limiting."]

projects.title: JustPrompt (Image & Prompt Discovery Platform)
projects.description: Engineered a high-performance web platform designed for exploring, searching, and managing curated image prompts, featuring a highly responsive gallery and a secure administrative portal.
projects.highlights: ["Architected backend logic using strict Repository and Service patterns, decoupling data access from business rules for maximum testability.","Implemented the Factory design pattern across Storage, Caching, Rate Limiting, and Search modules to allow seamless swapping of infrastructure providers.","Utilized the Next.js App Router to build dynamic public routes and a RESTful API with dedicated routes for cache revalidation and pre-signed upload URLs.","Developed custom rate-limiting middleware and a centralized observability layer for real-time error tracking and telemetry.","Built a memory-caching layer combined with a scheduled Cron job to batch and flush high-volume interactions (like counts) to the PostgreSQL database asynchronously.","Engineered an automated trending algorithm that calculates and refreshes trending items via a background Cron service."]

projects.title: AegisPrep (Automated Data Profiling & Preprocessing Platform)
projects.description: Engineered a comprehensive full-stack application designed to streamline machine learning preprocessing for tabular datasets, providing an end-to-end pipeline for versioning, profiling, and transformations.
projects.highlights: ["Architected a modular FastAPI backend utilizing a strict separation of concerns across Routers, Services, Schemas, and Database models.","Developed dedicated backend services to automatically extract statistical insights from uploaded datasets and validate data integrity.","Implemented a robust transformation engine to systematically apply cleaning and preprocessing rules to tabular data for ML model preparation.","Designed a local storage and database schema capable of managing dataset iterations, ensuring full reproducibility of preprocessing steps.","Enforced strict data validation using Pydantic schemas, ensuring type-safe contracts between the React frontend and FastAPI backend."]

projects.title: LeetCode Learner (Interactive DSA Visualizer)
projects.description: Engineered a comprehensive, interactive educational platform focused on Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA), specifically featuring step-by-step visualizers for binary tree operations.
projects.highlights: ["Architected the Next.js frontend utilizing a strict feature-sliced design pattern to isolate domain logic and maintain a highly scalable codebase.","Developed custom traversal engines to programmatically break down and manage the execution state of various tree algorithms.","Built synchronized UI panels (CallStack, Code, Explanation, Result) that react simultaneously to the traversal engine's state changes without rendering lag.","Implemented a TreePanel for real-time node rendering and a TreeSetupModal allowing users to intuitively input and manipulate custom binary trees.","Utilized specialized React hooks and centralized state selectors to cleanly connect core traversal logic to frontend components."]

projects.title: MagicLable (Static Web Interface)
projects.description: Developed a lightweight, static web application centered around rendering and interacting with visual label assets, leveraging modern utility-first CSS build pipelines.
projects.highlights: ["Engineered client-side logic using vanilla JavaScript and standard HTML to manipulate the DOM, ensuring a minimal footprint and fast execution.","Configured and integrated Tailwind CSS into the build process via PostCSS to generate optimized, utility-driven styles.","Managed dynamic and playful vector graphics (SVGs), ensuring resolution-independent rendering across various device sizes.","Maintained a Node-based development environment utilizing tools like chokidar, sucrase, and fast-glob to streamline the static build workflow."]

projects.title: AI Notetaker (Prayag.ai)
projects.description: A scalable meeting intelligence platform providing AI-powered meeting summaries, action items, and contextual insights.
projects.highlights: ["Integrated OpenAI Agents and Gemini models for AI-powered meeting summaries, action items, and contextual insights.","Implemented pipelines for sentiment analysis, embeddings, RAG, and multi-format document ingestion.","Developed a multi-agent workflow for transcription understanding to summarization output generation.","Reduced inference latency by 30% through Redis caching, optimized query design, and async background processing.","Designed FastAPI microservices with async I/O, structured logging, dependency injection, and task queues."]

projects.title: Vehicle Routing Optimization Using Genetic Algorithm
projects.description: Built a GA-based solver for the Vehicle Routing Problem.
projects.highlights: ["Reduced route cost by 30% through evolutionary optimization.","Implemented custom crossover, mutation, and fitness strategies for large-scale NP-hard route planning."]

projects.title: Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) Framework
projects.description: Developed a pipeline for automated cleaning, feature engineering, model selection, and training.
projects.highlights: ["Improved prediction accuracy by 20% and reduced preprocessing time by 30%."]
